data.name: BANG
data.detailed_description:
This is a realistic real life simulator where you can go to office talk to an npc.
Interested in playing a real life simulator. This game is for you


1. Walk around a office setting
2. Ask different questions and chat
3. Meet NPC
4. Experience a 3d Realistic game in first person

In this game you are with your AI girlfriend in an office. You can see the ai dance, workout, and you can do adult only activities such as sex in various position like doggy style and others.

Our team has several small time developers, many who have disabilities and who are giving it their best. We are unable to always product AAA standard games. But any support will be used to make the game better and improve it over time. We have put many hours into this game and it was hard work to develop this. We absolutely will be improving it more and more.

data.short_description: This is a realistic virtual life simulator where you can walk and chat. In this game you are with your AI girlfriend in an office. You can see the ai dance, workout, and you can do adult only activities such as sex in various position like doggy style and others.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64-Bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-3450 (3.1 GHz)/AMD FX-6300 (3.5 GHz)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Radeon RX 580 or Nvidia equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64-Bit
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-3820 (3.6 GHz)/AMD FX-8370 (4.0 GHz)
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1080 or AMD equivalent or better
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

data.legal_notice: Game and information is confidential and IP protected
